key: # BIO.CSV  —  Controls the Bio page content.
# HOW TO EDIT:  Change only the "value" column. Never rename the "key" column.
# LONG TEXT:    You can write a full paragraph in any value cell. Wrap it in double
#               quotes if it contains commas. Line breaks inside quotes are supported.
# COMMENTS:     Any row whose key starts with # is ignored by the site.
# Add as many images as you like: image_1  image_2  image_3  …
# For each image_N you can ALSO set these optional companion rows:
#   image_N_placement  →  full | wide | center | left | right

value: edge to edge of the screen

key: #   image_N_after      →  where it sits: a paragraph number (1 = after bio_1)
#   image_N_caption    →  small caption shown under the image  (blank = none)

description: Path to the image file
How this image sits in the text (see options above)
Place it after the first paragraph
Crop ratio (this studio photo is landscape 3:2)
Tilt in degrees (0 = straight)
Width when floated/centered
Caption under the image

key: # Add as many paragraphs as you need: bio_1  bio_2  bio_3  …
# Each value becomes one paragraph of text on the Bio page.
# To remove a paragraph  delete its row or leave the value empty.

value: Roman Chystakhovskyi is a figurative sculptor working at the threshold between physical and digital material. His practice explores the human body as a site of psychological tension — presence, vulnerability, and the weight of emotion made tangible in form.
description: First paragraph of the bio

value: Trained at the National Academy of Fine Arts and Architecture in Kyiv, Roman brings a classical foundation to a contemporary sensibility. His sculptures are hand-built in polymer clay and cast in resin, each piece emerging from an extended process of observation and psychological excavation.
description: Second paragraph

value: His series Variants of Love — acquired by Vincent Van Dyke Effects — marked a defining moment in his fine art practice: an investigation into the forms love takes when it overwhelms, consumes, or dissolves the self.
description: Third paragraph

value: Alongside his sculpture practice, Roman works as a senior 3D character and creature artist with credits at Blizzard, NetEase, and Romero Games. He lives and works in Leipzig, Germany.
description: Fourth paragraph
